already_exists: resume mode that skips completed prompts
append-mode result CSV and generation JSONL writes
audit_scope: inference checkpointing, chunked persistence, resume, and logging
missing_before_main_gpu_experiments: resume coverage for every backend path selected for main experiments
missing_before_phase4: Phase 3 WorkloadRecord to runner WorkloadItem adapter
memory_mode and dataset_split in run metadata/logs
recommended_phase4_tasks: Add a workload adapter for data/workloads/smoke_500/mm*.jsonl.
Run mock plumbing with mm0 and mm2 workloads before HF/vLLM.
Extend run metadata with memory_mode, vertical counts, and context token summary.
Add evaluator CLI over generation JSONL joined by prompt_id.

summary.current_capability: Supports chunk_size, checkpoint_path, resume, completed_prompt_ids, atomic checkpoint writes, and duplicate prompt skipping.
summary.phase4_gap: Needs adapter from Phase 3 WorkloadRecord JSONL to runner WorkloadItem.
summary.phase5_gap: Needs GPU run manifests to include memory_mode, dataset split, and telemetry IDs.

summary.current_capability: Chunked mode appends result CSV and generation JSONL after each chunk.
summary.phase4_gap: Extend chunked writing tests to Phase 3 memory-mode workloads.
summary.phase5_gap: Add durable per-run directories for main GPU runs.

summary.current_capability: Progress messages include processed count, chunk number, success/failure counts, elapsed seconds, aggregate request rate, and checkpoint_saved.
summary.phase4_gap: Logs do not yet include memory_mode, dataset_split, prompt vertical, or retrieval mode.
summary.phase5_gap: Add structured JSONL logs for long GPU/API runs.

summary.current_capability: Run metadata captures run_id, workload path, backend, model, optimization, concurrency, token settings, stream mode, success/failure counts, and wall clock.
summary.phase4_gap: Add memory_mode, retrieval_backend_label, and context_token fields.
summary.phase5_gap: Attach GPU telemetry file paths and hardware IDs.

summary.current_capability: BenchmarkResult and GenerationRecord capture success and error_message per prompt.
summary.phase4_gap: Add evaluator failure categories and prompt/gold join failure reporting.
summary.phase5_gap: Add retry classification for backend timeout, OOM, and validation failures.

summary.current_capability: HF runner foundation exists, but checkpoint/resume is not currently equivalent to openai-load-run chunked mode.
summary.phase4_gap: Decide whether Phase 4 HF plumbing needs chunked resume support.
summary.phase5_gap: Main GPU runs should use a resumable path before large sweeps.

summary.current_capability: System metadata capture exists for reproducibility, but live GPU telemetry is not implemented.
summary.phase4_gap: Record workload/run metadata alongside local smoke outputs.
summary.phase5_gap: Add nvidia-smi/pynvml/DCGM telemetry sampling for GPU runs.

summary.current_capability: CSV, JSONL generation records, checkpoint JSON, metadata JSON, and text logs are supported in parts of the harness.
summary.phase4_gap: Standardize per-run folder layout and log naming.
summary.phase5_gap: Use append-only JSONL logs for dashboard ingestion.

terminology_note: This project is not training or fine-tuning models in Phase 3. The relevant safety controls are inference checkpointing, chunked result persistence, resume support, and long-run logging.
